---
title: "Pathway_analysis_proteomics2"
author: "Savanah Leidholt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
.libPaths("~/leidholt/R")
```

```{r}
library(fgsea)      
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyverse)  
library(ggplot2)  
library(tidyr)     
library(gridExtra) 
library(msigdbr)
library(forcats)
library(stringr)
library(rlang)
library(limma)
```

#=====================================================
# inputting all directories and storage locations
#=====================================================
```{r}
#Directories
computer <- "mac studio"
#computer <- "mac laptop"

user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (computer == "mac studio") {
  
  if (user == "sleidholt") {
    dir.dat <- "/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
    dir.results <- "/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/"
    git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/PANTHER PFAS/"
    
  } else if (user == "shivaniramesh") {
    dir.dat <- "/Users/shivaniramesh/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UW/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
    dir.results <- "/Users/shivaniramesh/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UW/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Liver Pet IR/Results"
    
  } else if (user == "choiyej") {
    dir.dat <- "/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Laura Pyle - Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
    dir.results <- paste0(dir.dat, "/PANTHER/Results")
    git_path <- "/Users/choiyej/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
    
  } else if (user == "pylell") {
    dir.dat <- "/Users/pylell/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
    dir.results <- paste0(dir.dat, "/PANTHER/Results")
    git_path <- "/Users/pylell/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  }

} else if (computer == "mac laptop") {

  if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
    dir.dat <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
    dir.results <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/"
    git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
    
  } else if (user == "shivaniramesh") {
    dir.dat <- "/Users/shivaniramesh/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UW/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
    dir.results <- "/Users/shivaniramesh/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UW/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Liver Pet IR/Results"
  }
}
```


```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 1) MSigDB gene sets (Human)
# -----------------------------
msig_hs <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens")

# Reactome (C2:CP:REACTOME)
reactome <- msig_hs %>%
  filter(gs_collection == "C2", gs_subcollection == "CP:REACTOME") %>%
  select(gs_name, gene_symbol)

# GO categories (C5)
go_bp <- msig_hs %>%
  filter(gs_collection == "C5", gs_subcollection == "GO:BP") %>%
  select(gs_name, gene_symbol)

go_cc <- msig_hs %>%
  filter(gs_collection == "C5", gs_subcollection == "GO:CC") %>%
  select(gs_name, gene_symbol)

go_mf <- msig_hs %>%
  filter(gs_collection== "C5", gs_subcollection == "GO:MF") %>%
  select(gs_name, gene_symbol)

# Combine + split to fgsea pathways list
pathways <- bind_rows(reactome, go_bp, go_cc, go_mf) %>%
  distinct(gs_name, gene_symbol) %>%
  group_by(gs_name) %>%
  summarise(genes = list(unique(gene_symbol)), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tibble::deframe()

# Optional: sanity check sizes
summary(lengths(pathways))
```


#model ~age + sex
```{r}
# 2) read in limma results from plasma DE analysis that does NOT have stuy in the model
obj <- readRDS(file.path(dir.dat, "Savanah Leidholt", "T1D-T2D", "Data", "limma_gsea_inputs_age_sex_study.rds"))

dat1 <- obj$all_studies
dat2 <- obj$no_attempt
dat3 <- obj$all3_omics

dat1_fit <- dat1$fit
dat2_fit <- dat2$fit
dat3_fit <- dat3$fit

out1 <- dat1$out
out2 <- dat2$out
out3 <- dat3$out

contrast_names <- colnames(dat1_fit$coefficients) %>% trimws()
```


```{r}
analytes <- read.csv(file.path(dir.dat, "Data Harmonization", "Combined SomaScan", "analytes.csv"))

id_map <- analytes %>%
  transmute(
    feature_id  = AptName,
    gene_symbol = EntrezGeneSymbol
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_symbol), gene_symbol != "") %>%
  distinct()


```


```{r}
# analyte mapping must provide: feature_id -> gene_symbol
run_fgsea_contrast <- function(fit, coef_name, id_map, pathways,
                               feature_col = "feature_id",
                               symbol_col  = "gene_symbol",
                               rank_by = c("t", "logFC"),
                               minSize = 15, maxSize = 500) {

  rank_by <- match.arg(rank_by)

  # safe matching of coef name
  coef_name <- match.arg(coef_name, choices = colnames(fit$coefficients))

  tt <- topTable(fit, coef = coef_name, number = Inf, sort.by = "none") %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column(feature_col) %>%
    left_join(id_map, by = feature_col) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[symbol_col]]), .data[[symbol_col]] != "")

  # collapse duplicate genes
  tt_gene <- tt %>%
    group_by(.data[[symbol_col]]) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = abs(.data[[rank_by]]), n = 1) %>%
    ungroup()

  stats <- tt_gene[[rank_by]]
  names(stats) <- tt_gene[[symbol_col]]
  stats <- sort(stats, decreasing = TRUE)

  fgseaMultilevel(
    pathways = pathways,
    stats = stats,
    minSize = minSize,
    maxSize = maxSize
  ) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(
      contrast = coef_name,
      rank_metric = rank_by,
      n_genes_ranked = length(stats)
    ) %>%
    arrange(padj, desc(abs(NES)))
}



```


```{r}
fgsea_all <- map_dfr(
  contrast_names,
  ~ run_fgsea_contrast(
      fit = dat1_fit,
      coef_name = .x,
      id_map = id_map,
      pathways = pathways,
      rank_by = "t"
  )
)


```

```{r}
fgsea_all <- fgsea_all %>%
  mutate(collection = case_when(
    grepl("REACTOME", pathway) ~ "Reactome",
    grepl("GOBP", pathway)     ~ "GO:BP",
    grepl("GOCC", pathway)     ~ "GO:CC",
    grepl("GOMF", pathway)     ~ "GO:MF",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))


fgsea_all
#getting only significant pathways

fgsea_sig <- fgsea_all %>% filter(padj < 0.05 & abs(NES) >= 2)
table(fgsea_sig$contrast)


fgsea_all %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05 & abs(NES) >= 2) %>%
  count(contrast)

```

```{r}
enrich_dotplot <- function(fgsea_df, n = 15, title = NULL, wrap_width = 60) {

  if (nrow(fgsea_df) == 0) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = title %||% "No results"))
  }

  dfp <- fgsea_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(padj)) %>%
    slice_min(padj, n = n) %>%
    mutate(
      pathway = str_replace_all(pathway, "_", " "),
      pathway = fct_reorder(pathway, NES),
      neg_log10_padj = -log10(padj)
    )

  ggplot(dfp, aes(
    x = NES,
    y = pathway,
    size = size,
    color = neg_log10_padj
  )) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = label_wrap_gen(width = wrap_width)) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", name = "-log10(adj p)") +
    scale_size(range = c(2, 8), name = "Gene set size") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "pink") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)) +
    labs(
      title = title %||% unique(fgsea_df$contrast)[1],
      x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
      y = NULL
    )
}



```

```{r}
plots <- lapply(contrast_names, function(cn) {
  df <- fgsea_all %>% filter(contrast == cn)
  enrich_dotplot(df, n = 10, title = paste("FGSEA:", cn))
})

plots

```
```{r}
#plotting only top 10 reactome pathways in each contrast
fgsea_reactome <- fgsea_all %>%
  filter(grepl("^REACTOME_", pathway))

fgsea_reactome_top10 <- fgsea_reactome %>%
  group_by(contrast) %>%
  slice_min(padj, n = 15, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()


reactome_plots <- lapply(unique(fgsea_reactome_top10$contrast), function(cn) {
  df <- fgsea_reactome_top10 %>% filter(contrast == cn)
  enrich_dotplot(df, n = 15, title = paste("Top Reactome:", cn))
})


reactome_plots

gridExtra::grid.arrange(grobs = reactome_plots, ncol = 2)

```
```{r}
fgsea_all2 <- map_dfr(
  contrast_names,
  ~ run_fgsea_contrast(
      fit = dat2_fit,
      coef_name = .x,
      id_map = id_map,
      pathways = pathways,
      rank_by = "t"
  )
)

```

```{r}
fgsea_all2 <- fgsea_all2 %>%
  mutate(collection = case_when(
    grepl("REACTOME", pathway) ~ "Reactome",
    grepl("GOBP", pathway)     ~ "GO:BP",
    grepl("GOCC", pathway)     ~ "GO:CC",
    grepl("GOMF", pathway)     ~ "GO:MF",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))



#getting only significant pathways

fgsea_sig2 <- fgsea_all2 %>% filter(padj < 0.05 & abs(NES) >= 2)
table(fgsea_sig2$contrast)


fgsea_all2 %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05 & abs(NES) >= 2) %>%
  count(contrast)

```


```{r}
plots2 <- lapply(contrast_names, function(cn) {
  df <- fgsea_all2 %>% filter(contrast == cn)
  enrich_dotplot(df, n = 10, title = paste("FGSEA:", cn))
})

plots2

```
```{r}
#plotting only top 10 reactome pathways in each contrast
fgsea_reactome2 <- fgsea_all2 %>%
  filter(grepl("^REACTOME_", pathway))

fgsea_reactome2_top10 <- fgsea_reactome2 %>%
  group_by(contrast) %>%
  slice_min(padj, n = 15, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()


reactome_plots2 <- lapply(unique(fgsea_reactome2_top10$contrast), function(cn) {
  df <- fgsea_reactome2_top10 %>% filter(contrast == cn)
  enrich_dotplot(df, n = 15, title = paste("Top Reactome:", cn))
})


reactome_plots

gridExtra::grid.arrange(grobs = reactome_plots, ncol = 2)

```

```{r}
fgsea_all3 <- map_dfr(
  contrast_names,
  ~ run_fgsea_contrast(
      fit = dat3_fit,
      coef_name = .x,
      id_map = id_map,
      pathways = pathways,
      rank_by = "t"
  )
)


```

```{r}
fgsea_all3 <- fgsea_all3 %>%
  mutate(collection = case_when(
    grepl("REACTOME", pathway) ~ "Reactome",
    grepl("GOBP", pathway)     ~ "GO:BP",
    grepl("GOCC", pathway)     ~ "GO:CC",
    grepl("GOMF", pathway)     ~ "GO:MF",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))


fgsea_all3
#getting only significant pathways

fgsea_sig3 <- fgsea_all3 %>% filter(padj < 0.05 & abs(NES) >= 2)
table(fgsea_sig3$contrast)


fgsea_all3 %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05 & abs(NES) >= 2) %>%
  count(contrast)

```


```{r}
plots3 <- lapply(contrast_names, function(cn) {
  df <- fgsea_all3 %>% filter(contrast == cn)
  enrich_dotplot(df, n = 10, title = paste("FGSEA:", cn))
})

plots

```
```{r}
#plotting only top 10 reactome pathways in each contrast
fgsea_reactome3 <- fgsea_all3 %>%
  filter(grepl("^REACTOME_", pathway))

fgsea_reactome3_top10 <- fgsea_reactome3 %>%
  group_by(contrast) %>%
  slice_min(padj, n = 15, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()


reactome_plots3 <- lapply(unique(fgsea_reactome3_top10$contrast), function(cn) {
  df <- fgsea_reactome3_top10 %>% filter(contrast == cn)
  enrich_dotplot(df, n = 15, title = paste("Top Reactome:", cn))
})


reactome_plots3

gridExtra::grid.arrange(grobs = reactome_plots, ncol = 2)

```

```{r}
overlap_results <- lapply(contrasts, function(cc) {
  
  tibble::tibble(
    contrast = cc,
    
    n_sig1 = length(fgsea_sig),
    n_sig2       = length(fgsea_sig2),
    n_sig3       = length(fgsea_sig3),
    
    overlap_sig1_2 = length(intersect(fgsea_sig, fgsea_sig2)),
    overlap_sig2_3  = length(intersect(fgsea_sig2, fgsea_sig3)),
    overlap_sig1_3 = length(intersect(fgsea_sig, fgsea_sig2)),
    
    overlap_all_three = length(Reduce(intersect, list(fgsea_sig, fgsea_sig2, fgsea_sig3))),
    
    union_all_vs_noATT = length(union(fgsea_sig, fgsea_sig2 )),
    union_all_vs_all3  = length(union(fgsea_sig2, fgsea_sig3)),
    union_noATT_vs_all3 = length(union(fgsea_sig, fgsea_sig2)),
    union_all_three    = length(Reduce(union, list(fgsea_sig, fgsea_sig2, fgsea_sig3)))
  )
    
})

overlap_summary <- dplyr::bind_rows(overlap_results)
print(overlap_summary)
 overlap_all_three = length(Reduce(intersect, list(fgsea_sig, fgsea_sig2, fgsea_sig3)))
```
